texto: He says he knows someone isn't from the same race as he when that person looks at his library and asks, 'Have you read all of these?' A true book lover knows that, no, he hasn't read them all. It's about the process, it's about when the right reference comes up, you have the right book to go to; it's about never being without something to occupy your eyes and mind.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jamie S. Rich que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “He says he knows someone isn't from the same race as he when that person looks at his library and…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, books, reading, com foco em reading.
